title: pteris cretica var. stenophylla
intro: Pteris cretica var. stenophylla, also known as the ferny-leaved brake, is a type of fern that belongs to the Pteris genus. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pteris cretica var. stenophylla include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throat, and other respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
